Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ContentWorkspaceMember

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ContentWorkspaceMember
public class ContentWorkspaceMember extends SObject

Java class for ContentWorkspaceMember complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentWorkspaceMember">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ContentWorkspace" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentWorkspace" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentWorkspaceId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentWorkspacePermission" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentWorkspacePermission" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentWorkspacePermissionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Member" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MemberId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MemberType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
